name: Jackie Pro

movements.notes: must be completed within 3:15 (men) / 3:40 (women) to continue

source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2022/13 (official CrossFit Games event), retrieved 2026-07-09; a heavier-loaded, bar-muscle-up variant of the Girl WOD Jackie, with a qualifying row-time standard to continue to the thrusters/muscle-ups
